You hire a managing editor full-time who understands your space, then you hire an SEO person, and then you start to recruit a bunch of writers, know, whether they're experts, and you start to ramp up the content publishing, right, and you have a program manager and someone that stages all the content and some freelance graphic designers to do the rest, right, and that whole program will cost about $1 to $2 a word, essentially.
